_comment: pi-stack package-local defaults. Pi does NOT auto-load this file. Runtime configuration must be read from the official pi settings chain (~/.pi/agent/settings.json + project .pi/settings.json) under the piStack key, with this file only as fallback/default documentation.

memory._comment_v68: v6.8 (ADR 0012): sediment writes to TWO targets — pensieve (project-local filesystem) and gbrain default (universal principles). gbrain multi-source isolation is unimplemented in v0.27 (put/search/list ignore source_id), so we don't pretend to use it. When upstream ships working multi-source, migrate via `gbrain import .pensieve/ --source pi-stack`.

pensieve._comment: Project-local filesystem memory. Auto-detected from <projectRoot>/.pensieve/ directory existence.
pensieve.promotion: manual via /skill:pensieve refine — sediment writes only to short-term/

gbrain.languagePolicy: English-only; non-Latin content is pre-translated, blocked if translation fails

_v67_archived_design._comment: ADR 0011's two-track via gbrain sources (project=pi-stack source, world=default source) was abandoned when gbrain v0.27 was found to lack source isolation in put/search/list. Code archived at extensions/sediment/.v6.7-archive/. Restore only if upstream ships working multi-source.

sediment._comment: v6.8 (ADR 0012): proven dual-target architecture lifted from garrytan/pi-sediment. Per-target coalescing checkpoint scheduler with retry classification; agent-loop with read-only lookup tools (gbrain_search/get + pensieve_grep/read/list); markdown terminal protocol (SKIP / SKIP_DUPLICATE / ## PENSIEVE / ## GBRAIN).

model._comment: Both targets share these defaults. Override per target by env or project config.
model._reasoningRationale: v6.5 used xhigh on every turn (single-call era); v6.6+ agent loop iterates with tool feedback so each turn needs less depth. xhigh doubled wallclock for negligible gain (2.5min vs ~30s per SKIP).

envOverrides: PI_SEDIMENT_DISABLE=1      (disable sediment for this pi instance)

_v6_5_legacy._comment: Historical v6.5 multi-voter config. Code at .v6.5-archive/. Three voters consumed 1M tokens/turn with broken independence (shared prompt → same-direction drift) and 100% JSON parse failure rate.

_v6_7_legacy._comment: Historical v6.7 two-track config (project + world via gbrain sources). Code at .v6.7-archive/. Abandoned when gbrain multi-source proved unimplemented.

_resultClassification.failed_permanent: force-advance checkpoint (deterministic failures: bad config, exceptions)

promptInjectionFilter._rationale: Position-aware: real injection lands at top to steer model. Documentation describing these patterns later in body is not an attack.

subprocessGuards._comment: Sediment auto-disables in pi subprocesses (multi-agent print/rpc backends) to avoid (1) ephemeral conversations, (2) state.json races, (3) recursive subprocess spawning.

stopReasonGate._comment: Sediment skips agent_end events whose last assistant message has stopReason in {aborted, error, length}. Catches user ESC, sub2api SSE EOF, and maxTokens truncation — none of which produce content worth persisting.
